description:
Two `Store::local_dir()` consumers read files that SPEC §6.4 already names `clone.json` as the home for:

- `src/policy.rs:41` — `LocalConfig::path` → `local_dir/config.json`. The struct carries `require_remote_on_{claim,review,close}` + per-plugin `plugins` overrides. Loaded by `commands/plumbing.rs::sync_inputs`.
- `src/doctor.rs:130` — `check_tasks_dir_override` reads `local_dir/tasks_dir` marker.

SPEC §6.4 declares `clone.json` owns `stealth`, `tasks_dir`, plus optional per-clone overrides of `require_remote_on_*`, `auto_fetch_on_ready`, `stale_threshold_seconds`, etc., plus per-plugin participant overrides. SPEC §6.5 field table makes the precedence explicit ("clone.json field if present, else repo.json, else project.json, else built-in default").

## Scope

1. Extend `xdg_discover`'s `clone.json` loader so it returns the full layered field set (it likely already reads `stealth` + `tasks_dir`; add the rest).
2. Rewrite `commands/plumbing.rs::sync_inputs` to call the extended loader; delete `LocalConfig::path` and the `local_dir/config.json` reader. `policy::resolve*` keeps the same shape — only the *source* changes.
3. Rewrite `doctor::check_tasks_dir_override` to read `clone.json.tasks_dir` instead of the legacy marker file.
4. Migration: clones with `.balls/local/config.json` or `.balls/local/tasks_dir` are pre-XDG. `bl doctor` flags them with a "convert to clone.json" finding. No auto-import.

## Out of scope

- Deletion of `Store::local_dir()` — that is the parent (bl-a11d).
title: Fold LocalConfig (config.json) + tasks_dir marker into clone.json
